'''ân-k-y-t''' ('''kanakyetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impane|impane]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impane|impane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-k-y-t
|-
! Lemma
| kanakyetoko
|}
